description: CompositionBlack shorts made of cotton and polyester blend Dri Fit-fabric, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, insert pockets on the sides, zippered pocket on the right hip and embroidered brand logo on the left legFittingComfortWash careMachine wash warm degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wetWarm iron, but do not iron on designDo not dry cleanBuilt with breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this nike cricket shorts comes in a body friendly design. This high-performance shorts features Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the skin and keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets.
